VCalib — Top-5 Filter Visual Report

Top 5 configs by test_mean (DINOv2 feature-space reduction on held-out test pairs) for each illumination shift level. All 6 test scenes shown per filter.

Legend: Calibration map (viridis) shows where the filter changed pixel values. Improvement map (RdYlGn) shows pixel-level change toward target: green = closer to target, red = further from target. Metric bar = per-pair feature-space reduction computed by DINOv2 during training (higher = better alignment).
